title: Bridge Essay: Neural Basis of Dispositional Awe.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Neural Basis of Dispositional Awe.** — Front Behav Neurosci. PMID: 30258356. DOI: 10.3389/fnbeh.2018.00209. Awe differs from common positive emotions, triggered by vast stimuli, and characterized by aneed for accommodation (NFA). Although studies have revealed the downstream effects of awe experience, little is known about the neural basis of dispositional awe. In the current study, we determined the neural correlation of dispositional awe by using voxel-based morphometry (VBM) in 42 young healthy adults, as measured by the Dispositional Positive Emotion Scale (DPES).
